_comment: Apply this behaviour to the CloudFront distribution that fronts the frontend. It routes /api/* to the backend ALB so SSE streams are not buffered or cached by CloudFront.
_cachePolicyNote: 4135ea2d... is the AWS-managed 'CachingDisabled' policy (no caching at all)
_originRequestPolicyNote: AllViewerExceptHostHeader — forwards Authorization, Idempotency-Key, X-SSE-Session-ID, and all query strings to origin
_idleTimeoutNote: CloudFront itself has a hard 60-s read timeout per chunk for non-streaming origins. Route REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL directly to the ALB HTTPS endpoint (not through CloudFront) if SSE streams exceed 60 s between chunks. The ALB is configured to 300 s via .ebextensions/03_alb_sse_timeout.config.
